steps.title: Distribute the monomial
steps.content: Multiply $3a^2$ by each term in the parentheses. Distribution gives one product with $a$ and one product with $4$:$$3a^2(a+4)=3a^2\cdot a+3a^2\cdot 4$$

steps.title: Simplify both terms
steps.content: Use exponent rules for the variable term and multiply the coefficients for the constant term:$$3a^2\cdot a+3a^2\cdot 4=3a^3+12a^2$$The answer is D.
